prestazioni: Engine swap to a McLaren M838T 3.8L twin-turbo V8 (from the 650S/675LT) with a bespoke dry-sump system by Titan Motorsport, featuring forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) for 850HP at 8,200 RPM on E85 fuel, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel) and a custom 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Armytrix with electronically controlled valves for backpressure optimization

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential with a 3.73:1 final drive ratio, a Pankl Racing Systems 6-speed sequential gearbox with paddle-shift actuation by Motec, and a carbon-fiber driveshaft by GKN to reduce rotational mass by 18%

Suspension overhaul with a full Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilover system (2-way adjustable damping, 30mm ride height adjustment) paired with a custom front/rear anti-roll bar kit by SuperPro (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing conversion for all control arms, complemented by a bespoke hydraulic lift system by Air Lift Performance for 50mm of ground clearance adjustment
estetica: Full carbon-fiber body reconstruction using a custom Rocket Bunny widebody kit (M1A-inspired fenders, 3-piece front splitter, and a 20% larger rear diffuser) with a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon-fiber weave on the hood, roof, and rear clamshell, finished with a clear bra by XPEL for high-impact protection

Custom LED headlight conversion by Diode Dynamics (Cree XHP70.2 emitters, sequential turn signals, and adaptive cornering lights) paired with a retro-inspired 7-inch round taillight assembly by United Pacific, featuring sequential LED strips and a smoked lens for a vintage-meets-modern aesthetic

Interior rework with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards by Katzkin, featuring a custom digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada (12-inch display, CAN bus integration for M838T telemetry) and a bespoke MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, Alcantara grip, and integrated Motec shift lights), paired with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon-fiber shell, 6-point harnesses by Schroth)
